sections.markdown:
- No heavy legs session.
- Light tendon rehab and mobility only: easy ankle range, foot activation, glute bridge work, and pain-free isometric calf holds if they settle the Achilles rather than irritate it.
- Skip loaded calf raises, plyometrics, heavy squats, heavy hinge work, deep split squats, and soreness-chasing accessories.
- Keep symptoms stable or better by the next morning; if this makes the Achilles more noticeable, stop and treat Thursday as another no-run day.
